# Transportation

This sub-package handles transportation. [`TransportationManager`](project-logistics-manager.md#pod_lca.transportation.TransportationManager) class provides a means of managing a logistics operation (i.e., transportation of multiple [`Product`](products-and-processes.md#pod_lca.materials_screening.Product) objects). [`TransportationLeg`](logistics-leg.md#pod_lca.transportation.TransportationLeg) manages individual leg of transportation, including the travel distance, and [`TransportMode`](transport-mode.md#pod_lca.transportation.TransportMode) class manages various aspects of transportation modes, including their [`Impacts`](inventory-records.md#pod_lca.impacts.Impacts) and [`Emissions`](inventory-records.md#pod_lca.impacts.Emissions).
